title: LLVM Clang Merges Initial Support For NVIDIA Rigel Core With Next-Gen Rosa CPU
summary: Earlier this week NVIDIA confirmed some basic details around their next-gen Rosa  CPU that succeeds Vera. Among the public confirmation was that it will feature a "Rigel" Armv9.2-A core iterating on their Olympus core design. With the basic details published, NVIDIA immediately introduced Rigel core support into the GCC compiler. Now they have also upstreamed their initial Rigel core enablement into the LLVM Clang compiler...
imageAlt: LLVM Clang Merges Initial Support For NVIDIA Rigel Core With Next-Gen Rosa CPU
